channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned hire bikes, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned hire bikes blocking the traffic crossing outside Five Guys at coventry street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Coventry Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 4th March
item.description:
This pothole has been outside No 24 Friern Watch Avenue for some time and is getting increasingly bigger each day, which is hazardous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Friern Watch Avenue, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no MOT dumped next to playground on Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Car dumped behind Spooner House, by the playground on Barnfield Estate. Vicinity of loads of dumped cars by the guy running a 2nd hand business. Photos taken 3rd March. 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: SORN car dumped between 57 and 131 Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Flat tyres, clearly abandoned by same guy dumping cars everywhere round SE18. Photos taken 3rd March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalised untaxed car dumped outside Spooner House, Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Car dumped on the pavement, not even a parking space, untaxed, vandalised. Same guy dumping cars everywhere. Photos taken 3rd March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A series of potholes in line causing cars to swerve, 4th March
item.description:
The main DANGEROUS pothole is so deep you can see the old stone road surface from the 1920/30s. Then adjacent to this huge hole there's a line of DANGEROUS POTHOLES. So cars are serving all over the place to avoid them in the morning rush. I've recorded 2 very near misses of cars serving at the same time as people with children walking along the same stretch of road. THIS IS AN ACCIDENT WAITING TO HAPPEN, NEEDS IMMEDIATE ATTENTION. 04/MARCH/2026

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cansisters dumped in alleyway, 4th March
item.description:
Box of canisters dumped behind the garages of Sutherland Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sutherland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car dumped outside Spooner House, Barnfield Gardens, 4th March
item.description:
Another untaxed abandoned car taking up space for residents. Right in front of Spooner House and Squires House. Photos taken 3rd March 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The owner is taking the number plates off during the day to avoid parking ticket, 4th March
item.description:
As above
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blurton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole caused double puncture and I almost fell off my bike into traffic, 4th March
item.description:
Huge pothole is seriously dangerous and caused me to nearly fall off my bicycle and caused two punctures in both of my wheels.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Urlwin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp 046617 flashing on and off, 4th March
item.description:
Lamp post light is flashing on and off. I have a video but can't upload it here unfortunately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Mews, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car dumped on pavement outside Spooner House on Barnfield Estate, 4th March
item.description:
Photos taken 3rd March 2026. Car isn’t taxed nor parked in a proper parking space. It’s just been dumped on the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 4th March
item.description:
Pothole, cracked tarmac

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Pont Street, Belgravia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged manhole cover damaged in road causing noise pollution, 4th March
item.description:
Manhole cover outside 11 Erith Road directly opposite Bexley council offices is damaged and as traffic is constantly driving over it there is a constant annoying noise and vibration going through the houses. This noisey vibration is affecting sleep to myself and neighbours
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bin has beel overloaded and dropped on the ground, which has become unhygienic and a big mess., 4th March
item.description:
Rubbish by the Thicket road gate of Crystal Palace Park has been left for the last 5 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 239 kilburn lane, 4th March
item.description:
Large amount of waste dumped here on both sides Of entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Dirty matress and sink, 4th March
item.description:
Left abandoned in back street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155a, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep left bollard and lighting, 4th March
item.description:
Mid road keep left bollard and illuminated sign has been damaged for more than 6 weeks Please repair as this is an accident black spot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utility barriers still on roadway, 4th March
item.description:
LBB barriers have been left at above location for over one month on roadway. Please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Damaged Vehicle, 4th March
item.description:
I reported these vehicles on 16th Feb ref 8934360 The vehicles are still there & the roadside damage has got worse & is even more dangerous for anyone passing close. Can you help please advise what is being done about making this safe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
